ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "as_of_time" TEXT /* Time of the report */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "number_of_serious_cases" INTEGER /* Number of serious cases reported */,
  "number_of_death_cases" INTEGER /* Number of death cases reported */,
  "number_of_cases_still_under_treatment" INTEGER /* Number of cases still under treatment */,
  "number_of_discharged_cases" INTEGER /* Number of discharged cases */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the report is from */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_details" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily report the case is part of */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the case was reported */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., active, recovered, deceased) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "date_discharged" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "date_deceased" TEXT /* Date when the patient deceased */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities of the patient */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the treatment (e.g., admitted, transferred, discharged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test */,
  "last_test_result" TEXT /* Result of the last test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Detailed access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment facility */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the facility is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the treatment facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the treatment facility */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of patients in the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the occupancy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatment" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment history */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the treatment is for */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment facility */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the treatment provided */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, oxygen, ICU) */,
  "treatment_provider" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "treatment_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_details ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES treatment_facilities ("facility_id")
)
